title: Transportcraft Next Generation
description: The aim of the modpack is to focus on transportation and tech. There aren't many config changes from out of the default as it's mostly used on private server.
body:
![https://i.imgur.com/qKbnwNg.jpg](https://i.imgur.com/qKbnwNg.jpg) Transportcraft Next Generation is a next-gen spiritual successor to [The Society - Transportcraft (Curseforge)](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/the-society-transportcraft) that aims to be a bit more lightweight. The aim of the modpack is to focus on transportation and tech. There aren't many config changes from out of the default as **it's mostly used on private server**. Modpack is heavily based upon Create mod and mods that work well around it, but still keeping the original theme of transportation. # Recomended optional mods - [ThreatenGL](https://modrinth.com/mod/threatengl) - [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) - _if you want to use shaders, also make sure to install following to allow shaders and Create backend to work together_ - ~~[Iris & Oculus Flywheel Compat](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris-flw-compat)~~- This doesn't seem to work properly, instead use the following: - [Colorwheel](https://modrinth.com/mod/colorwheel) - [Colorwheel Patcher](https://modrinth.com/mod/colorwheel-patcher) # Important notes ## Survival system There are survival elements in the game like thirst, temperature etc, read more at [Legendary Survival Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/legendary-survival-overhaul) and [Spice of Life Onion](https://modrinth.com/mod/spice-of-life-onion). To add even more challenge [Serene Seasons](https://modrinth.com/mod/serene-seasons) has also been included. ## Storage systems Modpack is aimed at using Create so it's geared towards using it's storage systems (vaults, frogs & packages). We have however added [Sophisticated Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-storage) that adds drawers like functionality but integrates well with [Sophisticated Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-backpacks). ## Econonmy For our server economy we use [Create: Numismatics](https://modrinth.com/mod/numismatics) mod to implement currency and banking system. You can have your own bank account and you can create group/business bank accounts. Villager trading has been configured to use the new currency system also as much as possible. ## Transporation Elytras are disabled. To move around we prefer you create rail networks. We have also added [Trotting Wagons](https://modrinth.com/mod/trotting-wagons) & [AstikorCarts Redux](https://modrinth.com/mod/astikorcarts-redux). For now the boating needs can be done using [Small Ships](https://modrinth.com/mod/small-ships). Next to Create trains - Create Aeronautics](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-aeronautics) is the mod to give us ability to build any kind of vehicles in the modpack. We have also added [Create Jetpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-jetpack) with curious compatibility. ## Electricity The main mod for creating electric networks is [Create: The Factory Must Grow](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-tfmg). You can find one of the recent tutorials here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9_Hy6MyE0gA
## Finding stuff Both [Nature's Compass](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-compass) & [Explorer's Compass](https://modrinth.com/mod/explorers-compass) are available to aid you in searching stuff. ## Distant horizons is included by default If it causes lag on your computer you can tweak it's setting by setting the quality lower (to use less GPU) and tell to use less CPU. ## Chunkloading For mob spawning needs we have added [Scarecrows' Territory](https://modrinth.com/mod/scarecrows-territory) and for regular chunk loading we have [Chunk Loaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/chunk-loaders) - please be civilised when using them. ## Recipes Make sure to check recipes before you craft something as there are few removals, adjustments & additions in the modpack. ## Other [FallingTree](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingtree) is again included, meaning **if you don't hold shift while using axe**, entire trees will be felled - be careful when destroying tree blocks on your houses using axe. [Building Wands](https://modrinth.com/mod/building-wands) is also in the modpack to aid you in building. Create's Schematics cannons have been sped up also. To debug performance we have added [spark](https://modrinth.com/mod/l6YH9Als), [Observable](https://modrinth.com/mod/VYRu7qmG)& [ItemClearLag](https://modrinth.com/mod/NJcJEXNc) # Modlist ## Client Mods -
